title: Sandakari Vadi Vadi Song Lyrics KadaiKutty Singam
stanzas:
Sandakkari Vadi Vadi
unna adakki aaluren
kutti potta poona pola
vattam adikka yenguren. (2)

ettu vachi neeyum pona
sokkuthadi
ettu patti rasaa pechum
thukkuthadi.

Sandakkari Vadi Vadi
unna adakki aaluren
kutti potta poona pola
vattam adikka yenguren. (2)

maththalatha pola neethan
nenjayum thatturiye
mettetuthu naanum paada
thondaiya mutturiye.

ottumoththa oorume
uchchu kottum aambala.
unna kanda aasaiyil
nippathenna roatula.

saamy sathiyama
unna vittu vazha thonala.
kadhu kuththala naan
kitta vandhu kelu thevala.

andharathil oonjal poatu
enna nee konjanume
kichu kichu mootti
naan un kannatha killanume

etti ninnu neeyume
seivathenna baavana
mandhiricha kozhiya
vetta enna yosana.

kozhi engirundhu
vandhathunnu kekum oorula.
kadhal vandha vazhi
solla ingu yaarume illa.

Sandakkari Vadi Vadi
unna adakki aaluren
kutti potta poona pola
vattam adikka yenguren. (2)

ettu vachi neeyum pona
sokkuthadi
ettu patti rasaa pechum
thukkuthadi.

Sandakkari Vadi Vadi
unna adakki aaluren
kutti potta poona pola
vattam adikka yenguren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sandakari Vadi Vadi celebrates love and playful romance, showcasing the joy of being together.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Kadai Kutty Singam, highlighting a joyful moment between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song is sung by D Imman and Vandhana Srinivasan, with music composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Sandakari Vadi Vadi was released on July 26, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sandakari Vadi Vadi, the playful lyrics and upbeat rhythm reflect the carefree spirit of young love. The song captures a light-hearted moment in Kadai Kutty Singam, where the characters express their affection through dance and joy. With its catchy melody and vibrant energy, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration between D Imman and Vandhana Srinivasan adds a unique charm, ensuring it resonates with audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sandakari Vadi Vadi from Kadai Kutty Singam is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring the dynamic vocals of D Imman and Vandhana Srinivasan. This catchy duet perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance, making it a must-listen for any festive occasion. With D Imman's signature musical flair, this track is sure to get you dancing!
stanzaMeanings: Little girl, little girl, I am trying to catch you like a round ball that has been thrown away.
You too have gone away, just like a dog that has been chased away.
Little girl, little girl, I am trying to catch you like a round ball that has been thrown away.
Like a stone, you are hitting my heart, and I too am a shell that is ready to sing.
The whole village is shouting loudly. In the desire to see you, what will happen to me?
God, honestly, I can't live without you. If you come to me, I will tell you the truth.
What have you done to my heart?
In the crowd, if you swing, I will hold you tight and not let go of your eyes.
What will happen if you do what you want? I am thinking about this like a chicken that is being caught.
The chicken will come from where it is, but in this place, no one can say how love will come.
What have you done to my heart?
Little girl, little girl, I am trying to catch you like a round ball that has been thrown away.
You too have gone away, just like a dog that has been chased away.
Little girl, little girl, I am trying to catch you like a round ball that has been thrown away.
